comment.body:
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Trading_curb
Read it. 
This is what I refer to at the end of my daily post.
It is in effect. Not every environment is good for intraday reversion trading.
We made reversion tradings when there was no black swan risk and left-tail risk, but steady suppressed intraday vol. 
This is not the same regime. Yet. 
(I may sell vol here betting on liquidity hunt... not decided yet)

But isn't it insane how you came here, we longed Feb, shorted the Feb OpEx (despite everybody called supportive feb opex), shorted the market all the way down, while played for intraday reversion tradings... longed into March OpEx, played the bulltrap while built put positions, and now here we are?

We never been fooled by the market :)))

comment.body:
This is part of my point. Your last paragraph is what I was saying when “two or more things can be true at once”. You described it as “in the paraconsistential systems.. it is not about true/false bivaluation”. So we are in agreement there. There is truth in both of our perspectives.

But you are running on next level software/hardware 😂. So how realistic, given your “God given” talents, is it to say that your subscribers here can just read, study, and piece things together from a macro economic perspective in a similar way that you do, especially without the industry connections of the people that are, likely, just as talented as you in their own fields or your brain/life experience?

So, those are the things I think you forgot to mention above, like Dwayne not mentioning the juice.

There is still a lot of truth to your point, but I don’t think you are accounting enough for your own “God given” talent, experience, and connections in that equation.

So everything else isn’t bull shit. But when you say it like that it definitely gets me more hyped up and I’m hitting the books hard today 😂

comment.body:
since my childhood i do sports.
first i learned ballet until my 17s, then i went to uni studying math.
i wanted to be a ballet dancer.

but beside i do boxing and running as a hobby.

ballet is hard.
and i can tell you: you can fill your body as many sythetic chemical as you want, but if you don't work hard, it all won't worth anything.
the analogy is accurate if you say: the synthetic hormons etc. are like having money for a good computer, and books, etc. but without processing the infos and creatively using them, you won't make it too long.

and in the paraconsistential systems, the parts are consistent in itself, but the systems are not necessary consistent with eachother. its not about true/false bivaluation
